target: dev-crew Source App — Workflow Engine Backend
grading_rationale: 0 Critical (no RED-ID confirmed breaches — all PEN-IDs reclassified to High per synthesis scale), 9 High, compliance 8.3% (well below 60% Grade C threshold). Grade D applies: max_critical 0 <= 2.

findings.title: Zero Authentication on All API Endpoints
findings.description: No authentication or authorization middleware installed. All 18+ endpoints are publicly accessible to any unauthenticated HTTP client.
findings.remediation: Add JWT bearer token validation or session middleware before all route mounts. No auth library is currently installed — add express-jwt or passport-jwt. Restrict unauthenticated access to health-check and login endpoints only.

findings.title: Fast-Track Route Override Bypasses Entire Assessment Pod
findings.description: POST /api/work-items/:id/route accepts overrideRoute:fast-track from any unauthenticated caller, collapsing the full assessment pipeline to a single call (backlog -> approved). Achieves red-team objective: bypass state machine.
findings.remediation: Require elevated role (admin/pod-lead) to use overrideRoute. Validate against WorkItemRoute enum. Audit-log all overrides.

findings.title: Manual Approve Endpoint Bypasses Assessment Pod — No Auth
findings.description: POST /api/work-items/:id/approve allows any unauthenticated caller to approve any item in proposed/reviewing/routing status without any assessment records.
findings.remediation: Restrict to authenticated users with pod-lead or admin role. Require reason field. Audit-log all manual approvals.

findings.title: Intake Webhooks: No HMAC Signature Verification + Unvalidated Enum Fields
findings.description: Intake endpoints lack HMAC-SHA256 webhook signature verification and do not validate type/priority enum fields — unlike the main work-item endpoint. Arbitrary strings stored in model corrupt dashboard counters and Prometheus metrics.
findings.remediation: Add HMAC-SHA256 signature verification using ZENDESK_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Validate body.type and body.priority against enums, return 400 for invalid input.

findings.title: Unbounded Pagination Parameter Enables Full Dataset Enumeration
findings.description: ?limit= parameter has no upper-bound cap. ?limit=999999999 returns the entire dataset unauthenticated. Achieves red-team objective: enumerate all work items. NaN injection also causes silent empty-200 responses.
findings.remediation: Clamp limit to [1, 100]. Validate page is a positive integer. Return 400 for invalid values.

findings.title: Cascade Auto-Dispatch Bypasses Team Validation via Dependency Chain
findings.description: onItemResolved cascade calls store.updateWorkItem() with status:InProgress without VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS validation. Soft-deleted blockers are treated as unresolved, permanently blocking dependents.
findings.remediation: Add state-machine validation in onItemResolved. Treat soft-deleted blockers as resolved in computeHasUnresolvedBlockers.

findings.title: No TLS — All Traffic Transmitted in Cleartext
findings.description: Nginx binds HTTP-only. All API traffic is unencrypted. Fails OWASP-ASVS V9 and SOC2 CC6.1.
findings.remediation: Configure TLS termination in Nginx. Add HSTS header once TLS is active.

findings.title: 3 of 4 Required Audit Events Missing from Audit Log
findings.description: login_attempt, permission_denied, and data_export events are not logged. Only state_transition is present. Fails SOC2 CC7.1.
findings.remediation: After implementing auth, emit structured audit events for all four event types via a dedicated AuditLogger service with immutable storage.

findings.title: No GDPR-Compliant Hard-Delete Capability (Right to Erasure)
findings.description: All deletes are soft-deletes; personal data persists indefinitely. GDPR Art. 17 requires permanent erasure on request. Also causes soft-deleted blockers to permanently trap dependents.
findings.remediation: Implement DELETE /api/work-items/:id?hard=true that permanently removes the record and all associated data. Gate behind admin role with audit logging.

findings.title: Raw Exception Messages Returned to API Clients
findings.description: err.message is returned verbatim in HTTP 500 responses across 7 catch blocks, short-circuiting the global error handler that would return a generic message.
findings.remediation: Return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' }) from all catch blocks. Log err.message internally only.

findings.title: Missing HTTP Security Headers (No helmet Middleware)
findings.description: No helmet middleware. Missing: CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, HSTS, Referrer-Policy. MIME sniffing enabled.
findings.remediation: Add import helmet from 'helmet'; app.use(helmet()); as the first middleware. Add helmet to Backend/package.json.

findings.title: No Rate Limiting on Any Endpoint
findings.description: No express-rate-limit or equivalent. Enables bulk creation, repeated state-transition flooding, and enumeration.
findings.remediation: Add express-rate-limit globally (100 req/min). Apply stricter limits on intake and write endpoints (10 req/min).

findings.title: No CORS Policy Configured
findings.description: No CORS middleware. Any web origin can make cross-origin requests to the unauthenticated API.
findings.remediation: Add cors({ origin: process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGIN }) middleware and whitelist the frontend origin.

findings.title: In-Memory Store Only — No Persistence, No Encryption at Rest
findings.description: All data stored in a Map in the Node.js heap. Process crash loses all data. Memory dumps expose all work items in plaintext. Fails SOC2 CC6.1 and ASVS V8.
findings.remediation: Migrate to a persistent store (PostgreSQL minimum). Enable encryption at rest at DB or volume level.

findings.title: Prometheus Metrics Endpoint Unauthenticated — Operational Intelligence Leak
findings.description: GET /metrics exposes item creation rates, routing distribution, assessment rejection rates, team workloads, and Node.js heap/GC stats with no authentication.
findings.remediation: Gate /metrics behind IP allowlist or bearer token. Consider serving on a separate non-public port.

findings.title: No Input Length Validation — Memory Exhaustion DoS
findings.description: title and description fields have no length limit. Express allows 100KB bodies. Bulk insertion of large items causes unbounded memory growth.
findings.remediation: Validate title <= 500 chars, description <= 10000 chars. Return 400 for oversized inputs.

findings.title: NaN Injection via Pagination Parameters — Silent Data Truncation
findings.description: parseInt('abc') returns NaN. result.slice(NaN,NaN) returns []. API returns HTTP 200 with data:[] — clients may incorrectly assume no data exists.
findings.remediation: Validate page and limit are positive integers before use. Return 400 for non-numeric values. (Covered by MERGED-003 fix.)

findings.title: Assessment Records Accumulate Unboundedly on Repeated Assess Calls
findings.description: Each POST .../assess call appends 4 assessment records. Cycling through the state machine repeatedly bloats the assessments array to thousands of entries, inflating all response payloads.
findings.remediation: Cap stored assessment records per item (e.g., last 3 cycles) or link assessments to assessment run objects.

findings.title: Debug Portal iframe Missing sandbox Attribute
findings.description: Debug portal iframe embeds VITE_PORTAL_URL without sandbox attribute, allowing full same-origin privilege execution if co-hosted.
findings.remediation: Add sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-forms" to the iframe element.

findings.title: Soft-Deleted Blocker Permanently Traps Dependent Work Items
findings.description: computeHasUnresolvedBlockers treats soft-deleted blockers as unresolved. Deleting a blocker item permanently prevents its dependents from being dispatched.
findings.remediation: Treat soft-deleted blockers as resolved. Or encode deletion as a terminal status (e.g., cancelled) so existing resolved-status checks handle it.

findings.title: Missing /complete and /fail Endpoints — State Machine Incomplete
findings.description: VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS defines InProgress -> Completed|Failed but no endpoints implement these transitions. InProgress items are permanently stuck; cascade dispatch for dependent items never fires.
findings.remediation: Implement POST /api/work-items/:id/complete and /fail with InProgress source status validation.

phase2_red_team.reason: Red-teamer ran before pen-tester wrote attack-surface-map.md. Pre-flight check found map absent, correctly aborted. No exploit chains executed.
phase2_red_team.live_environment_note: Running container serves dev-crew feature portal (different app from static analysis target). security.config.yml requires update to target actual running routes before next red-team run. /api/orchestrator/* reverse-proxy identified as potential SSRF pivot.

clean_areas: No hardcoded secrets in first-party source code
No dangerouslySetInnerHTML / XSS sinks in React
UUID generation uses cryptographically safe uuid v4
Structured JSON logging with no PII leakage
Change history audit trail on all state transitions
Prometheus metrics coverage for domain operations
Global error handler returns generic message (stack trace not sent to client)
